question: From these maps, what can be concluded about which type of area has higher population density overall across states?

options.A: Urban areas definitely have higher density overall than rural areas
options.B: Rural areas definitely have higher density overall than urban areas
options.C: Urban and rural areas clearly have similar overall density levels
options.D: It cannot be determined from these maps alone which type has higher overall density

explanation: Both maps reuse the same threshold scale, but their underlying distributions differ. This can make one map appear more intense simply because more states fall into the top bin. In the underlying data, Urban Population Density has the higher average value, so that is the only reliable conclusion.
